Index.meta_title: Wasl - Modular hospitality platform for Lebanon & MENA
Index.meta_description: Wasl is a lightweight hospitality platform for QR menus, ordering, delivery, kitchen tickets, analytics, exports, branding, and future-ready modules.

ErrorBoundary.title: Something went wrong
ErrorBoundary.description: The page could not load safely. Please try again.
ErrorBoundary.dashboard_description: The dashboard could not load safely. Your data is not exposed here; try loading it again.
ErrorBoundary.public_menu_description: The menu could not load safely. Please retry or ask the restaurant staff for help.

Landing.hero_eyebrow: Modular hospitality platform for Lebanon & MENA
Landing.hero_title: QR menus, ordering, delivery, and operations in one lightweight platform.
Landing.hero_description: Wasl helps restaurants, cafés, lounges, bakeries, and hospitality teams run QR menus, table ordering, pickup, restaurant-owned delivery, tickets, analytics, exports, and branding without making guests download an app.
Landing.hero_signal_qr: Stable QR codes for menus and tables
Landing.hero_signal_currency: Local prices with optional USD display
Landing.hero_signal_modules: Roadmap payments, WhatsApp, POS, and loyalty modules
Landing.hero_stability_note: Menu changes, prices, branding, delivery settings, and welcome screens update online without changing printed QR URLs.
Landing.quick_flow_title: From table scan to kitchen ticket in three steps.
Landing.quick_flow_description: A simple guest flow built for busy restaurant service.
Landing.quick_flow_scan_qr_description: Customers instantly access your menu without downloading an app.
Landing.quick_flow_browse_menu_description: Fast multilingual menus optimized for mobile devices and weak connections.
Landing.quick_flow_order_instantly_description: Table ordering or counter pickup with kitchen-ready tickets.
Landing.why_wasl_description: Wasl keeps QR ordering simple, stable, and practical for restaurants, cafés, bakeries, and lounges.
Landing.why_wasl_stable_qr_description: Update menus, prices, branding, and availability without reprinting QR codes.
Landing.why_wasl_languages_description: Multilingual menus fit everyday hospitality service across Lebanon and MENA.
Landing.why_wasl_weak_connections_description: Lightweight mobile pages keep the guest experience fast on unstable networks.
Landing.why_wasl_ordering_modes_description: Support table ordering, counter pickup, or both from the same setup.
Landing.why_wasl_kitchen_tickets_description: Readable printable tickets help staff move quickly during rush periods.
Landing.why_wasl_welcome_branding_description: Add a clean mobile-first entry screen before guests open the menu.
Landing.product_preview_title: Real screens for daily restaurant service.
Landing.product_preview_description: A quick look at the guest menu, ordering flow, dashboard, and kitchen ticket experience.
Landing.product_preview_welcome_screen_descripti: A clean mobile entry screen before guests open the menu.
Landing.product_preview_mobile_menu_description: Readable item cards, multilingual browsing, and no app download.
Landing.product_preview_orders_dashboard_descrip: Staff review incoming table orders and update service status quickly.
Landing.product_preview_cart_flow_description: Guests review items and send orders from the table or counter.
Landing.product_preview_delivery_description: Delivery stays direct to the restaurant, with no marketplace dependency implied.
Landing.product_preview_ticket_description: Printable receipts keep quantities, notes, and table details clear.
Landing.product_preview_modules_description: Premium foundations are visible without exposing unfinished provider setup.
Landing.use_cases_title: Fits different service models across Lebanon & MENA.
Landing.use_cases_description: Wasl adapts to the way restaurants, cafés, and hospitality teams actually serve guests.
Landing.use_cases_restaurants_description: Table ordering and multilingual QR menus for dine-in service.
Landing.use_cases_cafes_description: Fast mobile menus optimized for rush hours and repeat orders.
Landing.use_cases_bakeries_description: Simple QR browsing for dine-in, takeaway, and daily specials.
Landing.use_cases_lounges_description: Premium branded menu entry with table-based service flow.
Landing.use_cases_beach_clubs_description: Mobile-first ordering without app downloads for outdoor service.
Landing.use_cases_fast_casual_description: Quick counter pickup and kitchen-ready tickets for high volume.
Landing.use_cases_trust_note: Arabic, English, and French support for hospitality businesses across Lebanon and MENA.
Landing.brand_mark_description: A simple Wasl route-and-menu mark for QR ordering, service flow, and restaurant operations.
Landing.customer_illustration_title: A lightweight ordering experience from scan to service
Landing.layers_title: A modular platform, not just a QR menu.
Landing.layers_description: Start with the ordering core, then add operations, branding, and premium modules when the restaurant is ready.
Landing.layer_core_ordering_description: The daily guest flow from QR scan to kitchen ticket.
Landing.layer_operations_description: Tools for staff, managers, and operational handoff.
Landing.layer_brand_experience_description: Make the public menu feel like the restaurant, not a generic tool.
Landing.delivery_title: Delivery stays owned by the restaurant.
Landing.delivery_description: Wasl supports restaurant-owned delivery for direct orders. It is not a driver marketplace and does not take over the customer relationship.
Landing.delivery_owned_description: Orders, guest details, and fulfillment stay with the restaurant team.
Landing.delivery_commission_free_description: Designed for direct ordering instead of marketplace-style commission dependency.
Landing.delivery_relationship_description: Restaurants keep the guest relationship, brand experience, and service promise.
Landing.delivery_no_marketplace_description: Wasl does not provide an external driver marketplace or third-party courier network.
Landing.trust_title: Lightweight foundations for real MENA service.
Landing.trust_description: Wasl focuses on stable URLs, resilient ordering, multilingual menus, and operational clarity.
Landing.trust_stable_qr_description: Menu and branding updates do not require QR reprints.
Landing.trust_weak_connections_description: Public menu pages stay light for unstable mobile networks.
Landing.trust_cart_recovery_description: Guest carts and order attempts are structured for recovery when connections wobble.
Landing.trust_languages_description: Language support fits common hospitality operations in Lebanon and MENA.
Landing.trust_mena_operations_description: Cash/manual habits, local currencies, and service styles are treated as normal.
Landing.roadmap_title: Premium modules are prepared, not prematurely exposed.
Landing.roadmap_description: Wasl shows what is available now and what is coming later, without claiming live provider integrations.
Landing.roadmap_payments_description: Provider-agnostic payment foundation for future checkout flows. No live checkout yet.
Landing.roadmap_whatsapp_business_description: Premium automation foundation for order updates, separate from the free WhatsApp contact button.
Landing.roadmap_pos_description: Planned CSV/manual foundation first. Foodics, Sapaad, Square, Toast, Lightspeed, and other APIs can come later; no live POS integration is active.
Landing.roadmap_loyalty_description: A planned retention layer for repeat guests, kept intentionally brief for now.
Landing.features_title: A managed operating layer for modern restaurants and cafés
Landing.features_description: QR ordering, multilingual menu publishing, table flows, local currency support, and staff-friendly dashboards for MENA service teams.
Landing.feature_qr_menu_description: Wasl configures QR menu flows so guests can open the right menu from their phone.
Landing.feature_table_ordering_description: Customers can submit table orders with simple details that help staff identify and serve them.
Landing.feature_faster_service_description: Staff can scan newest orders first and move them from pending to preparing, ready, and delivered.
Landing.feature_usd_lbp_description: Show a restaurant’s configured local currency, USD, or both. No exchange-rate conversion and no approximate pricing.
Landing.feature_arabic_english_description: Arabic is supported with RTL layout, while English remains the default and French stays available.
Landing.feature_dashboard_description: Restaurant staff can manage incoming orders, statuses, menu items, tables, and QR codes from one lightweight dashboard.
Landing.how_setup_menu_description: Wasl discusses the restaurant or café setup, menu structure, currencies, and service model before access is granted.
Landing.how_print_qr_description: Wasl helps validated clients create tables and download the right QR codes for service.
Landing.how_customer_orders_description: The guest scans, adds items to cart, enters a first name, and submits.
Landing.how_staff_manages_description: Staff use the dashboard to review orders and update statuses during service.
Landing.mena_description: Restaurants across the region need software that respects language, service styles, cash-first habits, and unstable connections.
Landing.mena_unstable_internet_description: The public menu stays lightweight and avoids unnecessary client-side complexity.
Landing.mena_bilingual_service_description: Guests can switch between English, Arabic, and French without changing the flow.
Landing.mena_cash_reality_description: Orders can stay aligned with existing cash or manual payment habits without forcing online payment processing.
Landing.templates_title: Restaurant templates for different service styles
Landing.templates_description: Wasl can prepare a visual and operational profile that fits the restaurant or café before QR codes go live.
Landing.template_fast_food_description: Compact, high-contrast menus for quick ordering and counter-friendly service.
Landing.template_cafe_description: Softer spacing and menu cards for drinks, pastries, and casual tables.
Landing.template_table_service_description: Balanced layouts for dine-in restaurants that manage orders by table.
Landing.template_shisha_lounge_description: Dark, relaxed styling for longer sessions and table-based service.
Landing.pricing_title: Start with the core, add modules when useful.
Landing.pricing_description: Wasl pricing can match a simple QR menu launch, a more operational restaurant setup, modular premium add-ons, or custom multi-location needs.
Landing.pricing_starter_description: QR menu, stable public links, basic ordering, and restaurant profile setup.
Landing.pricing_pro_description: Ordering workflows, delivery, tickets, analytics, exports, and stronger branding.
Landing.pricing_custom_description: For groups, lounges, bakeries, food courts, and hospitality businesses with multiple setups or module needs.
Landing.pricing_plan_note: Interested restaurants and cafés should contact hello@waslmena.com to request an onboarding discussion.
Landing.faq_payments_question: Does Wasl replace a restaurant POS or payment system?
Landing.faq_payments_answer: Wasl includes foundations for future online payments and POS integrations, but no live payment checkout or provider POS API is active yet. The current core supports QR menus, ordering, tickets, delivery, analytics, exports, and branding.
Landing.faq_languages_answer: Yes. Arabic is supported with RTL layout, and English and French are available from the same public menu flow.
Landing.faq_setup_question: Can anyone create a Wasl restaurant account?
Landing.faq_setup_answer: No. Wasl access is manually granted after the restaurant or café is validated by the Wasl team.
Landing.faq_templates_question: Can different restaurant types use different layouts?
Landing.faq_templates_answer: Yes. The admin can assign templates such as fast food, cafe, table service, and shisha lounge.
Landing.cta_title: Want to discuss Wasl for your hospitality venue?
Landing.cta_description: Tell us about your setup, service model, menu, and QR needs. The Wasl team will review the fit and next onboarding steps.
Landing.contact_description: New hospitality venues should contact hello@waslmena.com. Existing clients can use support@waslmena.com for technical support.
Landing.contact_hello_help: Use this for onboarding discussions and restaurant/café enquiries.
Landing.contact_support_help: Use this for existing client support and technical issues.
Landing.contact_form_description: Share a few details about your venue and Wasl will prepare the request for hello@waslmena.com.
Landing.contact_form_success: Your contact request has been prepared for Wasl. We will review it and follow up.
Landing.contact_form_invalid: Please enter your restaurant/café name, contact name, valid email, and message.
Landing.contact_form_error: There was a problem sending your message. Please try again later or email hello@waslmena.com.
Landing.contact_message_placeholder: Tell us about your venue, locations, service style, and QR ordering needs.
Landing.footer_text: Modular hospitality platform for Lebanon & MENA.

Hero.title: Managed QR ordering and restaurant operations for MENA.
Hero.description: Wasl supports validated restaurants and cafés with QR menus, local currency pricing, and staff order workflows.

Features.section_title: Managed tools for restaurant and café operations
Features.section_description: Menus, table QR codes, order status tracking, templates, local currency support, and guided onboarding.
Features.feature_description: Focused restaurant operations functionality with managed onboarding and support.

Pricing.section_title: Access for validated restaurant and café clients
Pricing.section_description: Wasl discusses setup, support, and operating needs manually before granting access.

FAQ.question: Does Wasl replace my POS or payment system?
FAQ.answer: No. Wasl focuses on QR ordering, multilingual menus, local currency support, and staff order management.

CTA.title: Discuss Wasl for your restaurant or café
CTA.description: Contact Wasl to review your setup, service style, QR ordering needs, and onboarding fit.

ProtectFallback.not_enough_permission: You do not have the permissions to perform this action

NetworkStatus.offline_banner: You are offline. Some actions may not work until the connection is back.

PublicMenu.meta_description: View the restaurant menu for your table.
PublicMenu.title: Menu
PublicMenu.description: Browse available items for this table.
PublicMenu.customer_name_error: Enter your first name before sending the order.
PublicMenu.submit_order_connection_helper: This may take a few seconds on slow connections. Please keep this screen open.
PublicMenu.connection_lost: Connection looks unstable. Keep this screen open and try again when it returns.
PublicMenu.order_rate_limited: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment and try again.
PublicMenu.pending_order_title: Your order may still be processing.
PublicMenu.pending_order_check_again_online: Check again when you are back online.
PublicMenu.order_failed_helper: If the order appears in the restaurant dashboard, do not submit it again. Otherwise, retry from this screen.
PublicMenu.order_success_helper: Keep this number visible for restaurant staff.
PublicMenu.order_error: We could not send the order. Please check the connection and try again.
PublicMenu.whatsapp_prefilled_message: Hello, I have a question about my order.
PublicMenu.restaurant_unavailable_description: This restaurant menu is currently unavailable. Please contact the restaurant staff.

SignIn.meta_description: Seamlessly sign in to your account with our user-friendly login process.

SignUp.meta_description: Effortlessly create an account through our intuitive sign-up process.

DashboardLayout.restaurant_dashboard_helper: Manage this restaurant/location’s orders, menu, QR & Tables, statistics, and settings.

Team.meta_description: View lightweight restaurant team roles and current organization members.
Team.title_bar_description: A lightweight foundation for restaurant team access.
Team.members_section_description: Members are loaded from the current Clerk organization. MVP roles are informational and do not change dashboard permissions yet.
Team.members_unavailable: Team members could not be loaded right now. Check Clerk organization membership settings.
Team.invitation_guidance: Use the existing organization members screen to invite or remove team members.
Team.roles_section_description: These roles define the intended operational model for Wasl without adding a full HR system.
Team.guide_owner_description: Responsible for the restaurant account, billing, setup, and final operational decisions.
Team.guide_manager_description: Runs daily operations, keeps menu and service settings updated, and monitors performance.
Team.guide_service_staff_description: Works with incoming orders, table flow, customer names, notes, and order status updates.
Team.guide_kitchen_staff_description: Focuses on preparation, ready status, and kitchen tickets during service.
Team.mvp_note: MVP note: Clerk currently exposes organization admin/member roles here. Owner/Manager/Service/Kitchen roles are a foundation for future granular permissions, not separate enforcement yet.

ExportBackup.meta_description: Download lightweight restaurant setup and operational exports.
ExportBackup.title_bar_description: Download practical copies of your restaurant setup and key data.
ExportBackup.section_description: Generate server-side exports for the current restaurant/location only. These files are for safekeeping and operational handoff.
ExportBackup.menu_export_description: Categories, menu items, descriptions, prices, availability, images, and empty badge placeholders.
ExportBackup.menu_csv_export_description: Spreadsheet-friendly menu export for onboarding, review, and future manual POS comparison.
ExportBackup.menu_export_summary: {categories, plural, =1 {# category} other {# categories}} · {items, plural, =1 {# item} other {# items}}
ExportBackup.tables_export_description: Table identifiers, table numbers, stored QR codes, QR settings, and stable public menu URLs.
ExportBackup.settings_export_description: Branding, colors, welcome screen, ordering mode, QR settings, contact info, and public menu preferences.
ExportBackup.orders_export_description: Uses the existing bounded orders CSV export for the last 48 hours by default.
ExportBackup.orders_export_summary: {orders, plural, =1 {# recent order} other {# recent orders}}
ExportBackup.empty_state: No exportable restaurant data yet. Add menu items, tables, or orders before downloading operational files.
ExportBackup.safety_note: Exports only include the active restaurant organization. Images are referenced by URL; this tool does not create image archives, scheduled backups, imports, or cloud restores.
ExportBackup.location_scope_note: Multi-branch businesses should export each restaurant/location profile separately. There is no consolidated branch export yet.

DashboardPOS.meta_description: View the restaurant POS bridge foundation.
DashboardPOS.title_bar_description: POS foundation is planned. CSV/manual preparation comes first, with API integrations later.
DashboardPOS.section_description_enabled: Your POS module is enabled as a foundation. It does not replace your POS or run automatic sync yet.
DashboardPOS.section_description_disabled: The POS module is not enabled yet. This page shows the foundation Wasl can prepare with you.
DashboardPOS.last_sync_placeholder: No sync has run. POS sync is not active yet.
DashboardPOS.empty_config: No POS configuration has been prepared yet. This page is a readiness foundation only.
DashboardPOS.csv_manual_description: Wasl exports and manual comparison are the planned first step before any live POS provider connection.
DashboardPOS.api_later_description: Foodics, Sapaad, Square, Toast, Lightspeed, and other APIs can be connected later without changing current order flows.

Statistics.title_bar_description: A quick operational snapshot for this restaurant.
Statistics.overview_section_description: Simple sales and order health for the selected service period.
Statistics.top_items_section_description: Best-selling menu items by quantity sold.
Statistics.rush_hours_section_description: Orders by hour for the selected period.
Statistics.daily_sales_section_description: Lightweight day-by-day sales without external analytics.
Statistics.status_section_description: Where orders currently stand for this period.
Statistics.custom_range_invalid: Custom ranges are limited to 31 days. Choose a shorter range.
Statistics.empty_top_items: No item sales in this period yet.
Statistics.empty_analytics: No orders in this period yet.
Statistics.empty_history: No service orders in this period.
Statistics.finance_section_description: Optional management view using existing orders and your manual costs.
Statistics.finance_revenue_help: Uses stored order totals for {period}. USD and local currency stay separate.
Statistics.finance_margin_help: Revenue minus the manual monthly costs entered below, without currency conversion.
Statistics.finance_disclaimer: Indicative management tool only. This is not accounting software and does not handle invoices, taxes, POS reconciliation, or official reporting.
Statistics.finance_costs_form_description: Enter costs in the currency you actually use. Leave unused currencies blank.

Dashboard.meta_description: Manage orders, menu, QR & Tables, statistics, and settings.

OrganizationSelection.title: Choose a restaurant workspace
OrganizationSelection.description: Select the organization you want to manage. Personal workspaces are hidden for this restaurant dashboard.

DashboardIndex.title_bar_description: Manage orders, menu, QR & Tables, statistics, and settings.
DashboardIndex.welcome_description: Start with incoming orders, then jump to menu edits, QR & Tables, statistics, branding, or support.
DashboardIndex.summary_description: A quick snapshot for the selected restaurant organization.
DashboardIndex.quick_actions_description: Jump into the main restaurant workflows.
DashboardIndex.setup_description: Follow a simple path for branding, menu, QR, ordering, operations, and modules.
DashboardIndex.orders_description: View incoming orders, update statuses, print tickets, and keep service moving.
DashboardIndex.menu_description: Create and update menu items, availability, prices, and categories.
DashboardIndex.menu_categories_description: Organize the sections guests see on the public menu.
DashboardIndex.tables_description: Manage table numbers and download QR codes for guest ordering.
DashboardIndex.statistics_description: Review recent order counts, totals, and basic order history.
DashboardIndex.settings_description: Adjust branding, currency labels, and restaurant-facing settings.
DashboardIndex.modules_description: See which optional restaurant modules are prepared and ready for future integration.
DashboardIndex.support_description: Find help and share questions from the restaurant dashboard.

SetupWizard.meta_description: Follow a guided setup path for the restaurant dashboard.
SetupWizard.title_bar_description: A lightweight guide that links to the existing setup pages.
SetupWizard.progress_description: Progress is computed from your current restaurant data. Nothing is saved on this page.
SetupWizard.identity_description: Set the public restaurant identity guests see before they order.
SetupWizard.identity_helper: {logo, plural, =1 {Logo configured} other {Logo optional but recommended}}
SetupWizard.identity_public_info: Public information such as hours, address, or WhatsApp
SetupWizard.menu_description: Prepare categories, items, prices, and optional photos before sharing QR codes.
SetupWizard.menu_helper: {categories, plural, =1 {# category} other {# categories}} · {items, plural, =1 {# item} other {# items}}
SetupWizard.menu_images: Images are optional and should stay lightweight
SetupWizard.menu_csv: CSV import is available for faster onboarding
SetupWizard.qr_description: Prepare the menu QR flow guests will use in the restaurant.
SetupWizard.qr_helper: {tables, plural, =0 {No tables yet} =1 {1 table} other {# tables}}
SetupWizard.qr_table: Table QR if table ordering is used
SetupWizard.qr_stable: QR links should stay stable after printing
SetupWizard.ordering_description: Review pickup, table ordering, and restaurant-owned delivery settings.
SetupWizard.ordering_delivery_on: Delivery is enabled. Check fee and timing before service.
SetupWizard.ordering_delivery_off: Delivery is off. Pickup/table ordering can still be used.
SetupWizard.operations_description: Make sure the team knows where to receive, print, export, and review orders.
SetupWizard.operations_helper: {orders, plural, =0 {No orders recorded yet} =1 {1 order recorded} other {# orders recorded}}
SetupWizard.modules_description: Understand which modules are live, planned, or coming later.

UserProfile.title_bar_description: View and manage your user profile

MenuCategories.meta_description: Manage menu categories for your restaurant.
MenuCategories.title_bar_description: Organize the sections guests see on your menu.
MenuCategories.create_section_description: Add a main category, or choose a parent to create a subcategory.
MenuCategories.language_help: Fill at least one language. Guests see their selected language when available.
MenuCategories.error_missing_name: Enter a category name in at least one language.
MenuCategories.error_category_in_use: This category can’t be deleted while it has subcategories or items assigned.
MenuCategories.delete_confirm: Delete this category? Menu items in it may become harder to manage.
MenuCategories.empty_state: No categories yet. Start with simple sections like Starters, Mains, Drinks, or Desserts.

MenuItems.meta_description: Manage menu items for your restaurant.
MenuItems.title_bar_description: Manage the dishes and drinks guests can order.
MenuItems.advanced_appearance_description: Control public menu style and item photo visibility.
MenuItems.show_menu_item_images_label: Show item photos on public menu
MenuItems.show_menu_item_images_help: Photos remain stored and can be shown again later.
MenuItems.create_section_description: Add categories, subcategories, and menu items from one place.
MenuItems.create_category_help: Create a main section of the menu.
MenuItems.create_subcategory_help: Create a rubric inside an existing category.
MenuItems.create_item_help: Add a dish, drink, or product to the menu.
MenuItems.category_language_help: Fill at least one category name.
MenuItems.language_help: Fill at least one item name. Descriptions are optional in each language.
MenuItems.image_url_help: Optional. Use a compressed photo; smaller images load faster and the menu works without photos.
MenuItems.image_preview_helper: Preview only. Broken image links are hidden on the public menu.
MenuItems.price_lbp_help: Enter the full local currency amount, for example 42.
MenuItems.price_local_help: Enter the full {currency} amount, for example 42.
MenuItems.price_requirement: Enter a {currency} price, a USD price, or both. USD is optional.
MenuItems.merchandising_help: Optional badges and promo pricing for the public menu.
MenuItems.original_price_help: Use original prices only when they are higher than the current price.
MenuItems.error_missing_price: Enter at least one price: USD or {currency}.
MenuItems.error_invalid_image_type: Upload must be JPG, PNG, or WEBP.
MenuItems.error_image_too_large: Uploaded image must be 300 KB or smaller.
MenuItems.error_upload_failed: Image upload failed. Try a smaller compressed image or upload again on a stronger connection.
MenuItems.error_missing_file: Choose a CSV file before importing.
MenuItems.error_file_too_large: CSV file must be 512 KB or smaller.
MenuItems.error_category_in_use: This category can’t be deleted while it has subcategories or items assigned.
MenuItems.error_currency_mismatch: Keep one currency rule for the whole menu. If USD is used, every item needs USD. If {currency} is used, every item needs {currency}. If both are used, every item needs both.
MenuItems.error_original_price_below_price: Original price must be higher than or equal to the current price.
MenuItems.is_available_help: Unavailable items remain visible but cannot be ordered.
MenuItems.csv_section_description: Use CSV files to speed up onboarding and prepare menu data for future manual POS comparison.
MenuItems.csv_import_description: Create or update categories and items from a spreadsheet. Existing items are never deleted.
MenuItems.csv_import_safety: Images are not changed by CSV import. Matching uses item_id when present, otherwise item name plus category.
MenuItems.csv_export_description: CSV includes categories, subcategories, multilingual text, prices, availability, and badges.
MenuItems.csv_summary_body: Categories: {categoriesCreated} created, {categoriesUpdated} updated. Items: {itemsCreated} created, {itemsUpdated} updated. {skipped} skipped, {errors} errors.
MenuItems.list_section_description: Current menu items for this organization.
MenuItems.category_list_section_description: Current categories and subcategories for this organization.
MenuItems.delete_confirm: Delete this menu item? Existing orders keep their saved price snapshot.
MenuItems.delete_category_confirm: Delete this category? Menu items in it may become harder to manage.
MenuItems.empty_categories_state: No categories yet. Start with simple sections like Starters, Mains, Drinks, or Desserts.
MenuItems.empty_state: No menu items yet. Add your first dish or drink so guests can start ordering.
MenuItems.no_categories_state: Create a category first, then add dishes and drinks to it.
MenuItems.no_parent_categories_state: Create a category before adding subcategories.

RestaurantTables.meta_description: Manage restaurant tables for QR ordering.
RestaurantTables.title_bar_description: Create table numbers for future QR code ordering.
RestaurantTables.create_section_description: Add a physical table for this organization.
RestaurantTables.qr_code_title: Public menu QR code for table {tableNumber}
RestaurantTables.general_qr_section_description: Use this QR for menu browsing without creating a table.
RestaurantTables.delete_confirm: Delete this table? Existing orders will stay saved.
RestaurantTables.delete_blocked_message: This table has existing orders and cannot be deleted.
RestaurantTables.general_menu_no_tables: General menu mode is active. No table QR codes are required.
RestaurantTables.empty_state: No tables yet. Create the restaurant tables you want customers to scan from.
RestaurantTables.advanced_section_description: Adjust ordering flow, QR appearance, table options, and public menu style.
RestaurantTables.enable_customer_name_help: Ask guests for a name on orders.
RestaurantTables.enable_whatsapp_contact_help: Show the contact action on public menus.
RestaurantTables.show_menu_item_images_label: Show item photos on public menu
RestaurantTables.show_menu_item_images_help: Photos remain stored and can be shown again later.

RestaurantBranding.meta_description: Configure public menu branding for your restaurant.
RestaurantBranding.title_bar_description: Customize how your public QR menu appears to guests.
RestaurantBranding.section_description: All fields are optional. Leave them empty to use the default public menu style.
RestaurantBranding.branch_note_description: This profile represents one restaurant branch/location. If your business has multiple branches, create a separate restaurant profile for each location so QR codes, orders, exports, and settings stay clear.
RestaurantBranding.address_help: Optional. Shown on the public menu and on printed/copied order tickets for this location.
RestaurantBranding.public_details_description: Optional guest-facing details shown in the compact menu information block.
RestaurantBranding.primary_color_help: Used for main customer buttons on the public menu.
RestaurantBranding.accent_color_help: Used for borders and secondary highlights.
RestaurantBranding.theme_mode_help: Day keeps a light presentation, night uses a darker one, and auto follows the device preference when available.
RestaurantBranding.template_style_help: Choose a lightweight visual style for the public QR menu.
RestaurantBranding.whatsapp_number_help: Optional. Customers can use it to contact the restaurant about questions, not automated ordering.
RestaurantBranding.whatsapp_enabled_help: Show or hide the WhatsApp contact button on the public menu.
RestaurantBranding.welcome_screen_description: Optionally show a fast branded screen before guests open the menu.
RestaurantBranding.welcome_enabled_help: Only appears when an optimized welcome image is uploaded. Without an image, QR codes open the menu directly.
RestaurantBranding.welcome_image_help: Upload a background image only. Do not include buttons, text, labels, or menu instructions inside the image. Recommended: 1080x1920 vertical JPG or WEBP.
RestaurantBranding.welcome_image_upload_note: Recommended max size: ~1.5 MB. Images are automatically resized, compressed, and saved as WEBP and AVIF for mobile performance.
RestaurantBranding.welcome_preview_help: This image is independent from menu item photos and still displays when menu photos are disabled.
RestaurantBranding.welcome_remove_label: Remove welcome image and skip the splash screen
RestaurantBranding.welcome_button_position_help: Horizontal position stays centered. Lower center is the mobile-first default.
RestaurantBranding.welcome_button_color_help: Auto-filled from the uploaded image when possible. You can manually override it anytime.
RestaurantBranding.welcome_generated_color_empty: Upload an image to generate a color.
RestaurantBranding.welcome_use_accent_label: Use welcome screen color for public menu
RestaurantBranding.welcome_use_accent_help: Use the color detected from the welcome image as the menu accent color. You can still adjust it manually later.
RestaurantBranding.order_notifications_description: Control how this restaurant notices new pending orders after refreshing the orders page.
RestaurantBranding.visual_notifications_help: Show an in-page banner, highlight new pending orders, and use browser notifications when allowed.
RestaurantBranding.sound_notifications_help: Play a short sound for new pending orders after refresh. Some browsers require a prior tap or click.
RestaurantBranding.local_currency_help: Optional. Existing local prices are preserved. Use AED, SAR, QAR, KWD, EGP, MAD, or LBP + LL for Lebanon. USD prices remain optional per menu item. No conversion is performed.
RestaurantBranding.error_invalid_welcome_image: Upload a JPG or WEBP welcome image under 5 MB.
RestaurantBranding.error_invalid_branding: Use a valid logo URL, color, and currency settings.

Orders.meta_description: View and manage incoming restaurant orders.
Orders.title_bar_description: Track incoming table orders during service.
Orders.refresh_helper: New orders do not appear automatically yet. Refresh this page during service to check for new orders.
Orders.service_newest_first: Service queue is newest first. Active orders stay open; completed and cancelled stay collapsed.
Orders.custom_range_invalid: Custom ranges are limited to 31 days. Choose a shorter range to view orders.
Orders.orders_limit_helper: Last 48 hours is the default so late-night service stays visible after midnight. Use filters for older orders.
Orders.export_limit_helper: For performance reasons, exports are limited to 90 days at a time. Large exports are limited for performance and connection stability.
Orders.elapsed_minutes: {count, plural, =1 {# min ago} other {# min ago}}
Orders.elapsed_hours: {count, plural, =1 {# hour ago} other {# hours ago}}
Orders.edit_remove_help: Set quantity to 0 to remove an item.
Orders.empty_status_section: No active orders here right now.
Orders.whatsapp_automation_coming_soon: WhatsApp automation coming soon. The foundation is ready, but no messages are sent yet.
Orders.pending_notification_visual_helper: Visual alerts use the current restaurant settings and appear after refreshing orders.
Orders.pending_notification_sound_helper: Sound is enabled. Browser and mobile audio may require a prior tap or click on this page.
Orders.pending_notification_banner: {count, plural, =1 {New pending order detected.} other {# new pending orders detected.}}
Orders.pending_notification_browser_body: {count, plural, =1 {1 new pending order arrived.} other {# new pending orders arrived.}}
Orders.pending_notification_blocked: Browser notifications are blocked in your browser settings.
Orders.edit_locked_message: Completed and cancelled orders cannot be edited. Reopen the order first if changes are needed.
Orders.empty_state: No active orders right now. Keep this screen open during service and refresh when guests order.

PilotChecklist.meta_description: Check restaurant setup readiness before a Wasl pilot.
PilotChecklist.title_bar_description: A read-only setup checklist based on your current restaurant configuration.
PilotChecklist.progress_description: This checklist is computed from existing dashboard data. Nothing is saved here.
PilotChecklist.starter_step_branding: Add branding and public restaurant details.
PilotChecklist.starter_step_menu: Add categories and at least five menu items.
PilotChecklist.starter_step_qr: Create tables or test the general menu QR.
PilotChecklist.starter_guidance_title: You are at the beginning of setup.
PilotChecklist.starter_guidance_description: Focus on the first three steps before inviting guests to scan a QR code.
PilotChecklist.identity_branding_description: Make the public menu recognizable and trustworthy.
PilotChecklist.menu_readiness_description: Prepare enough menu structure for a real test order.
PilotChecklist.qr_tables_description: Confirm guests can open the menu from the right QR flow.
PilotChecklist.orders_operations_description: Check that staff can receive, print, and export order data.
PilotChecklist.delivery_pickup_description: Review fulfillment settings before accepting direct orders.
PilotChecklist.modules_roadmap_description: Confirm future modules are understood as roadmap or foundation items.
PilotChecklist.item_five_menu_items: At least five menu items exist
PilotChecklist.item_table_exists_if_used: At least one table exists if table ordering is used
PilotChecklist.item_qr_stable_reminder: QR codes remain stable after setup
PilotChecklist.item_delivery_fee_time_checked: Delivery fee and time checked if delivery is active
PilotChecklist.count_categories: {count, plural, =0 {No categories yet} =1 {1 category} other {# categories}}
PilotChecklist.count_menu_items: {count, plural, =0 {No menu items yet} =1 {1 menu item} other {# menu items}}
PilotChecklist.count_unavailable_items: {count, plural, =0 {All current items are available} =1 {1 item is marked unavailable} other {# items are marked unavailable}}
PilotChecklist.count_translated_items: {count, plural, =0 {No translated item labels yet} =1 {1 item has a translated label} other {# items have translated labels}}
PilotChecklist.count_tables: {count, plural, =0 {No tables yet} =1 {1 table} other {# tables}}
PilotChecklist.count_orders: {count, plural, =0 {No orders recorded yet} =1 {1 order recorded} other {# orders recorded}}

PilotFeedback.meta_description: Collect structured staff feedback during a restaurant pilot.
PilotFeedback.title_bar_description: Send structured feedback to Wasl during the restaurant pilot.
PilotFeedback.form_description: Share what happened during setup or service. Feedback is stored for Wasl admins only.
PilotFeedback.success_message: Feedback submitted. Thank you for helping improve the pilot.
PilotFeedback.error_missing_message: Please describe what happened before submitting feedback.
PilotFeedback.error_rate_limited: Please wait before sending another feedback.
PilotFeedback.message_label: What happened or what should improve?
PilotFeedback.message_placeholder: Describe the issue, suggestion, or confusing step.
PilotFeedback.sensitive_data_warning: Do not include customer personal data, card details, passwords, or private messages.
PilotFeedback.page_context_placeholder: Orders, menu items, table QR, checkout...
PilotFeedback.customer_script_description: Ask a test customer to walk through the real QR ordering flow.
PilotFeedback.customer_scan_qr_code: Scan the QR code from the table.
PilotFeedback.customer_open_menu: Open the menu page and look through the available items.
PilotFeedback.customer_add_item_to_cart: Add at least one item to the cart.
PilotFeedback.customer_enter_first_name: Enter a first name for the order.
PilotFeedback.customer_submit_order: Submit the order and wait for the confirmation message.
PilotFeedback.customer_report_confusion: Report anything confusing, slow, unclear, or unexpected.
PilotFeedback.staff_grid_description: Use these prompts after or during quiet moments in service.
PilotFeedback.staff_reading_orders_description: Were orders easy to scan quickly on the dashboard?
PilotFeedback.staff_speed_of_service_description: Did the flow slow down or speed up the staff during service?
PilotFeedback.staff_status_clarity_description: Were pending, preparing, ready, delivered, and cancelled clear enough?
PilotFeedback.staff_missing_information_description: What information was missing from orders, items, tables, or customer details?
PilotFeedback.staff_pricing_clarity_description: Were local currency and optional USD prices clear for staff and customers?
PilotFeedback.staff_connection_issues_description: Did weak internet affect menu loading, submitting, or refreshing orders?
PilotFeedback.staff_qr_scanning_issues_description: Were QR codes easy to scan from the printed position and lighting?
PilotFeedback.staff_suggested_improvements_description: What small change would make the next test easier or safer?

Support.meta_description: Get lightweight support for the restaurant ordering dashboard.
Support.title_bar_description: Quick help for restaurant users during setup and service.
Support.contact_description: Use the official Wasl support contacts configured by the founder admin.
Support.form_description: Send a short message to Wasl support. We'll reply to the email you provide.
Support.form_success: Message sent — support will reply shortly.
Support.form_error: There was a problem sending your support message. Please try again later.
Support.form_invalid: Please provide a subject and message before sending.
Support.whatsapp_unavailable: WhatsApp support is not configured yet.
Support.quick_start_description: The first setup steps to complete before a pilot service.
Support.quick_start_identity_description: Add the restaurant name, colors, contact details, opening hours, and public information.
Support.quick_start_menu_description: Create the menu sections guests will browse, then add items, prices, descriptions, and availability.
Support.quick_start_tables_description: Add table numbers, preview QR codes, and download the codes for printing.
Support.quick_start_public_menu_description: Open the general QR and at least one table QR on a phone before service.
Support.quick_start_order_flow_description: Add items to the cart, submit a test order, and confirm the success message appears.
Support.quick_start_ticket_description: Open the test order from Orders and confirm the kitchen ticket is readable.
Support.daily_operations_description: Simple service habits for running Wasl during a pilot.
Support.daily_operations_monitor_orders_descript: Keep the Orders page open on a staff device during service.
Support.daily_operations_refresh_pending_descrip: Use Refresh orders during service. Realtime updates are not enabled yet.
Support.daily_operations_print_tickets_descripti: Use Print ticket for kitchen or service handoff when an order arrives.
Support.daily_operations_sold_out_description: Mark unavailable items in Menu items so guests cannot order them.
Support.daily_operations_exports_description: Use Export & Backup for practical copies of menu, tables, settings, and bounded orders.
Support.delivery_pickup_description: Use only the fulfillment options the restaurant can operate during the pilot.
Support.delivery_pickup_toggle_description: Turn delivery on only when the restaurant can receive and fulfill delivery orders.
Support.delivery_pickup_address_phone_descriptio: For delivery orders, confirm staff reviews the customer address and phone before preparing dispatch.
Support.delivery_pickup_owned_delivery_descripti: Wasl supports restaurant-owned delivery notes and fees. It does not dispatch drivers.
Support.delivery_pickup_no_marketplace_descripti: There is no marketplace delivery, courier marketplace, or automatic third-party delivery integration.
Support.faq_description: Common questions for the MVP pilot.
Support.faq_pilot_setup_question: What should I set up before service?
Support.faq_pilot_setup_answer: Create categories, menu items, tables, and QR codes. Then test one full order from a phone before customers arrive.
Support.faq_qr_codes_question: Where do I get QR codes?
Support.faq_qr_codes_answer: Open Tables in the dashboard. Each table has a QR preview and download button for its public menu link.
Support.faq_menu_prices_question: Can I use local currency and USD prices?
Support.faq_menu_prices_answer: Yes. Menu items can have local currency, USD, or both. The app does not convert between currencies.
Support.troubleshooting_qr_not_opening_descripti: Check that the printed QR is clear, the phone camera can focus, and the table still exists in the dashboard.
Support.troubleshooting_orders_not_appearing_des: Confirm the customer saw the success message, then refresh the Orders page and check the internet connection.
Support.troubleshooting_order_pending_descriptio: Ask the customer to keep the page open, refresh Orders, and retry only once if the order does not appear.
Support.troubleshooting_image_upload_fails_descr: Use a small JPG, PNG, or WEBP image. If upload still fails, continue without an image and try again later.
Support.troubleshooting_weak_connection_descript: Use the strongest available Wi-Fi or mobile data, keep Orders open, and avoid large uploads during service.
Support.troubleshooting_dashboard_access_descrip: Confirm the user is in the correct organization and contact Wasl if access still looks wrong.
Support.troubleshooting_refresh_orders_descripti: Open Orders and use the Refresh orders button during service. Realtime updates are not enabled yet.
Support.troubleshooting_update_prices_descriptio: Open Menu items, expand Edit on the item, update the local amount and/or optional USD cents, then save.
Support.coming_soon_description: These modules are not live yet during the pilot unless Wasl explicitly configures them later.
Support.coming_soon_payments_description: Payment foundations exist, but live payment processing is not active yet.
Support.coming_soon_whatsapp_description: WhatsApp automation is a foundation only. Wasl does not send automated WhatsApp messages yet.
Support.coming_soon_pos_description: POS pages prepare future integrations. They do not sync with a POS automatically yet.
Support.coming_soon_loyalty_description: Loyalty is a roadmap module and is not active in the current pilot flow.

Billing.current_section_description: Adjust your payment plan to best suit your requirements

CheckoutConfirmation.message_state_description: Your payment has been successfully processed. Thank you for your purchase!

Todos.title_bar_description: View and manage your todo list

AddTodo.add_todo_section_description: Fill in the form below to create a new todo

EditTodo.edit_todo_section_description: Fill in the form below to edit the todo

TodoForm.title_description: Enter a descriptive title for your todo.
TodoForm.message_description: Enter a detailed message for your todo.
